splash.tagline: As a traveller, as a friend

welcome.title: Welcome aboard Bon Vivant!
welcome.subtitle: I assume you are a traveller looking to explore our world differently.
welcome.bio: I'm Manuel, Cruise Director for 20 years, and a Bon Vivant just like you.
welcome.bio2: I've created insider guides for 50+ port cities — the places I actually send my passengers, not the tourist traps.

valueProps.label: Hand-picked
valueProps.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't.
valueProps.subtitle: Full guides, offline maps, all my tips completely free.
valueProps.feature1Desc: Every restaurant, café and hidden gem hand-picked by Manuel — not an algorithm.
valueProps.feature2Desc: Got 4 hours or 8? Pre-built routes optimized for your exact time at port.
valueProps.feature3Desc: Maps, guides, everything. Works without WiFi or data. Open once, explore freely.

pickCity.label: Your first guide
pickCity.title: Choose a city, it's on me.
pickCity.subtitle: Full guide, offline maps, all my tips completely free.

preview.feature3Desc: The things only locals would know
